allow: Bash(/c/xampp/php/php.exe -r "echo 'PHP: ' . PHP_VERSION . PHP_EOL; echo 'OpenSSL: ' . \(extension_loaded\('openssl'\) ? OPENSSL_VERSION_TEXT : 'NOT LOADED'\) . PHP_EOL;" 2>&1)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -p1234 central_admin -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM tenant;" 2>&1)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -p1234 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 smartideaaisw -e "SELECT * FROM franchise LIMIT 1;" 2>&1)
Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -p1234 central_admin -e "SHOW CREATE TABLE tenant;" 2>&1)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -p1234 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 central_admin -e "SELECT td.tenant_id, t.company_name, td.db_name, td.db_host, td.db_user, td.status FROM tenant_database td JOIN tenant t ON t.id = td.tenant_id WHERE td.status = 'ACTIVE';" 2>&1)
